cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to find f(f(f(2^2025))), where f(n) is the sum of the digits of n. Hmm, that seems pretty straightforward, but 2^2025 is a huge number. I can't compute that directly, so I need to find a smarter way. Let me think. First, maybe I should recall some properties of digit sums. I remember that the repeated sum of digits of a number until you get a single digit is related to the number modulo 9.
